overview.description: The iShares BBB Rated Corporate Bond ETF (LQDB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of BBB rated USD denominated corporate bonds with at least one year to maturity. LQDB was launched on May 18, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: iBoxx USD Liquid Investment Grade BBB 0+ Index
